summary: Classified the live PR inventory shard independently. No shared canonical was selected. No close, merge, fix, or PR-opening action is planned because instant close, low-signal close, merge, fix, and raise_pr are disabled for this job. The linked security-sensitive historical PR #40846 and validator-flagged PR #89117 are quarantined with exact-ref route_security actions; the remaining open PRs are either kept open for proof/check/review gaps or routed to human review for focused technical judgment.
